name: RINBO
short_description: Embark on an epic adventure of gliding and battling through mystical lands in RINBO, where discovery awaits at every turn!
detailed_description:
Step into the enchanting world of RINBO, where every path unfolds new adventures and delightful discoveries await at every turn.

Play as Soren, a young Noble driven by rivalry with his twin brother Blue, as they embark on a quest to gain the approval of the enigmatic demon Dorimkasto.

On their 11th birthday, their journey for ascension begins, leading Soren through diverse landscapes and encounters with otherworldly beings.

Key Features


  • Magical 3D Action-Adventure: Immerse yourself in thrilling magic and melee combat as you navigate an expansive world.
  • Glide Freely: Soar through enchanting landscapes without a care, exploring from lively forests to mysterious dungeons.
  • Rich Storytelling: Unravel the secrets of RINBO through engaging narratives and quirky NPCs across 4 bustling towns.
  • Quests Galore: Embark on quests, collect rare Moons and gems, and interact with over 100 colorful characters who bring the world to life.
  • Captivating Soundscapes: Immerse yourself in a soundtrack that shifts from whimsical melodies to pulse-pounding boss themes.
  • Visual Splendor: Experience toon-style landscapes with surreal, dark fantasy atmospheres that breathe life into every corner of RINBO.

Prepare for a journey where every decision adds a dash of magic to your adventure. Whether you're exploring for fun, strategy, or pure joy, RINBO promises an experience that will keep you enchanted from start to finish.
